start_lines.speaker: Sage
start_lines.text: Marigold? I am Sage. I keep the plant shop, mostly upright.

start_lines.speaker: Marigold
start_lines.text: You are not interrupting. What can I do?

start_lines.speaker: Sage
start_lines.text: I have a tray of young roots that will not wake after being moved.

start_lines.speaker: Marigold
start_lines.text: Sleepy roots. That sounds like it wants soft magic, not a shove.

start_lines.speaker: Sage
start_lines.text: Exactly. Could you make a Root-Wake Tonic for them?

reminder_lines.speaker: Sage
reminder_lines.text: No hurry. The roots are sleeping stubbornly, but not dangerously.

reminder_lines.speaker: Marigold
reminder_lines.text: Dewcap mushroom and glowberries, right? I will keep it gentle.

complete_lines.speaker: Sage
complete_lines.text: That is exactly it. Soft magic, not too sharp.

complete_lines.speaker: Marigold
complete_lines.text: Good. I was hoping not to startle anyone's seedlings on my first week.

complete_lines.speaker: Sage
complete_lines.text: Thank you, Marigold. Please take this seed packet, and a little gold for your time.

start_lines.speaker: Camellia
start_lines.text: Marigold, yes? Camellia. I run the restaurant in town.

start_lines.speaker: Marigold
start_lines.text: It is nice to meet you. Sage said Mapleton's lunches are famous.

start_lines.speaker: Camellia
start_lines.text: Famous on a very local scale, which is the best kind.

start_lines.speaker: Camellia
start_lines.text: I need something bright for the menu. Gentle, not too sweet.

start_lines.speaker: Marigold
start_lines.text: Glowberries with moonleaf should keep it balanced. I can brew that.

reminder_lines.speaker: Camellia
reminder_lines.text: The cordial should be bright without shouting.

reminder_lines.speaker: Marigold
reminder_lines.text: Moonleaf, glowberries, and forest water. Bright, but polite.

complete_lines.speaker: Camellia
complete_lines.text: There it is. Bright, clean, and kinder than the usual tavern punch.

complete_lines.speaker: Marigold
complete_lines.text: That is exactly the review I wanted.

complete_lines.speaker: Camellia
complete_lines.text: This will do nicely. Keep the recipe; I suspect I will ask for it again.

title: A Cordial Delivery
board_unavailable_lines: The Mapleton notices are pinned neatly, but nothing here needs Marigold today.
board_start_lines: Request: two bottles of Glowberry Cordial for Camellia at the restaurant stall.
Please deliver them in person before the lunch rush.
board_active_lines: Camellia still needs Glowberry Cordial x2 delivered to the restaurant stall.
board_completed_lines: Camellia's cordial request has a small satisfied check mark beside it.
not_started_lines: I left a small note on the notice board, if you are taking town requests.

reminder_lines.speaker: Camellia
reminder_lines.text: Two Glowberry Cordials should be enough for the lunch special.

reminder_lines.speaker: Marigold
reminder_lines.text: I will bring them here as soon as they are bottled.

complete_lines.speaker: Camellia
complete_lines.text: Perfect timing. The noon regulars have been asking what smelled so bright.

complete_lines.speaker: Marigold
complete_lines.text: Then I had better not stand between them and lunch.

complete_lines.speaker: Camellia
complete_lines.text: Two bottles will let me test the special properly. Please take this for the delivery.

post_complete_lines: The cordial has already earned a few approving nods. That is high praise before lunch.

title: A Gentle Restock
board_unavailable_lines: The Mapleton notices are pinned neatly, but nothing here needs Marigold today.
board_start_lines: Request: one Root-Wake Tonic for Sage's seedling shelf.
Please deliver it to the plant stall when it is ready.
board_active_lines: Sage still needs one Root-Wake Tonic delivered to the plant stall.
board_completed_lines: Sage's restock request has a tidy check mark beside it.
not_started_lines: I pinned a small restock note to the board, if you are taking town errands.

reminder_lines.speaker: Sage
reminder_lines.text: One Root-Wake Tonic should be enough for this shelf.

reminder_lines.speaker: Marigold
reminder_lines.text: They are still just taking their time?

reminder_lines.speaker: Sage
reminder_lines.text: Yes. The seedlings are not in danger. They are simply unhurried.

complete_lines.speaker: Sage
complete_lines.text: Ah, there it is. The seedlings will appreciate the gentleness.

complete_lines.speaker: Marigold
complete_lines.text: I am beginning to think Mapleton plants have strong opinions.

complete_lines.speaker: Sage
complete_lines.text: Most do. A careful tonic is better than a loud one. Please take this for the trouble.

post_complete_lines: The seedlings have perked up without becoming dramatic. That is ideal.

title: A Fresh Pot
board_unavailable_lines: The Mapleton notices are pinned neatly, but nothing here needs Marigold today.
board_start_lines: Request: one pot of Brookmint Tea for Camellia at the restaurant stall.
The newly cleared forest path should have enough fresh brookmint.
board_active_lines: Camellia still needs Brookmint Tea delivered to the restaurant stall.
board_completed_lines: Camellia's Brookmint Tea request has a neat check mark beside it.
not_started_lines: I left a fresh note on the board. It is a small experiment for the lunch menu.

reminder_lines.speaker: Camellia
reminder_lines.text: Brookmint Tea should be cool and green, but not sharp.

reminder_lines.speaker: Marigold
reminder_lines.text: Fresh enough to clear the room, not freeze it. I understand.

complete_lines.speaker: Marigold
complete_lines.text: The forest path was worth the mud on my boots, then.

complete_lines.speaker: Camellia
complete_lines.text: Absolutely. Keep the recipe; I will want this again.

post_complete_lines: The Brookmint Tea has already made the kitchen feel cooler. I am calling that a success.
